extraction.one_line_summary: FROOME Chris attacked with 500m remaining on Cumbre del Sol, dropped rivals after Sky controlled on preceding Peñalosa climb
tactical_patterns: Cannondale then Sky neutralized 10-rider break on Peñalosa approach, preventing any energy-saving moves before summit finish.
Sky replayed 2015 stage footage on team bus to calibrate exact attack point, suggesting precise power modeling.
Froome delayed acceleration until final 500m rather than sustained climb attack, exploiting punchy finale over pure climbing power.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: First stage win in a year signals return to explosive finishing form after sustained dominance period
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Esteban: positive: Only GC rival not losing over 1 minute to Froome reveals consistent climbing rather than single-effort strength
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Keeping pace with Chavez suggests Canadian adapting to three-week racing after one-day puncheur profile
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Unable to follow when attacking partner Chaves got distanced indicates weakness not visible in earlier attacks
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: negative: Sky neutralizing his attack before finale shows he lacks accelerations dangerous enough to warrant marking
